headlines.title: Ever Restless Mount Dukono Erupts
headlines.summary: The volcano on Indonesia’s Halmahera Island routinely ejects ash, volcanic gases, and volcanic bombs.

headlines.title: NASA to Announce Artemis III Crew, Provide Mission Progress Update
headlines.summary: NASA will provide an update on the agency’s Artemis III mission and announce the astronauts assigned to the test flight during a live event at 11 a.m. EDT on Tuesday, June 9, at the agency’s Johnson Space Center in Houst
